hero.title:
Restoring
balance naturally.
hero.desc: Discover the serenity of holistic healing in our traditional clinic nestled in the heart of the city.

section.title: Our Philosophy
section.subtitle: Harmony of Body & Nature
section.body:
At An Binh, we believe that true wellness comes from the balance between the internal elements of the body and the external rhythms of nature.

Drawing from thousands of years of traditional wisdom, our approach combines time-honored herbal remedies with modern understanding to restore your body's natural capacity for healing.

herbs.title: Premium Herbal Selection
herbs.subtitle: Curated for Potency
herbs.body:
Every formulation begins with the careful selection of premium herbs. We prioritize ingredients that are ethically sourced and harvested at peak maturity to ensure maximum therapeutic value.

Experience the difference that quality makes in your journey to wellness.

bento.title:
Explore our key therapies
and traditional remedies

q1.question: What types of conditions can Traditional Medicine treat?
q1.answer: Traditional Medicine is effective for a wide range of conditions, including chronic pain, digestive issues, stress-related disorders, insomnia, and hormonal imbalances. We take a holistic approach to address the root cause of your symptoms.

q2.question: Is acupuncture painful?
q2.answer: Most patients experience little to no pain. The needles are extremely thin—about the width of a hair. You may feel a slight prick or a dull ache, which is actually a good sign that the energy (Qi) is being activated.

q3.question: How long does a consultation usually take?
q3.answer: An initial consultation typically lasts 60-90 minutes. This allows our practitioners to conduct a thorough pulse diagnosis, understand your medical history, and create a personalized treatment plan.

q4.question: Are the herbal remedies safe to take with my other medications?
q4.answer: Your safety is our priority. During your consultation, we review all medications you are currently taking to ensure there are no interactions. Our herbal formulas are crafted from high-quality, ethically sourced ingredients.

q5.question: Are the pre-decocted herbal formulas as high quality as self-brewed ones?
q5.answer: Yes, even better. The closed-pressure decoction system at An Binh extracts maximum active ingredients that manual brewing can lose to evaporation. Medicines are vacuum-sealed in sterile bags, preserving full potency and flavor. extremely convenient for busy people while ensuring consistent dosage.

reviews.body: Real healing, real stories. Hear how traditional medicine has restored balance to our patients' lives through our holistic treatments.

0.name: Minh T.
0.text: I was skeptical about traditional medicine, but the acupuncture treatments here completely reset my sleep cycle. I feel years younger.

1.name: Sarah J.
1.text: The atmosphere is so calming. An Binh is a hidden gem in Winnipeg for anyone looking for holistic care.

2.name: David L.
2.text: The herbal tea blends are not only delicious but actually effective. My digestion has never been better.

0.name: Emily R.
0.text: Finally found relief for my shoulder pain after months of struggling. The staff is incredibly professional.

1.name: James K.
1.text: A sanctuary of peace. The treatments helped me manage my work stress significantly.

2.name: Linh N.
2.text: I love the personalized approach. They really take the time to understand your body's needs.
